name: Official Bernie 2016
subject: Bernie organizing events near Silver Spring this week
body:
#
Dear Bernie Volunteer,
Tens of thousands of volunteers are hitting the streets every week for Bernie, leafleting and talking to others in their communities about this movement.
That starts in your community, team, and there are events happening near you in the next week.
**[Yes! I want to attend an organizing event for Bernie.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2259/43f17890/5846caea/621c39b2/2194448071/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyMDkwMiJ9/ "http://map.berniesanders.com/#zipcode=20902&distance=50&daterange=this-week?utm_medium=email&utm_source=officialbernie2016&utm_campaign=events&utm_content=attend_an_event")**
**[Sorry, I can't make it, but I can chip in $3 to our campaign.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2259/43f17890/5846caea/621c39b3/2194448071/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/event-contribute?refcode=em150916-no-ev")**
Here's your closest event in the next week:
**What:** Talk and Walk in Columbia in Columbia
**Where:** 7200 Dockside Lane (off Cradlerock Way)
Columbia, MD 21045
**When:** 10:00 am EDT
Saturday, September 19th
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/4j4ht)
**[Or check out all events happening in your area.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2259/43f17890/5846caea/621c39b2/2194448071/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyMDkwMiJ9/ "http://map.berniesanders.com/#zipcode=20902&distance=50&daterange=this-week?utm_medium=email&utm_source=officialbernie2016&utm_campaign=events&utm_content=attend_an_event")**
Right now our biggest priority is to bring in new volunteers. We do that by spreading the word in person about Bernie's message, turning on new supporters, and making contact with all the supporters already out there.
**By signing up new volunteers, these volunteer events are actually building the organization that will soon move on to voter registration and voter contact.** We're building an organization in all 50 states that is going to win this election.
Here's the big picture of what we're doing:
1. Right now, we're growing our organization by signing up new volunteers through leafleting, house parties and other fun activities.
2. Next, we'll mobilize that organization to do voter contact work like voter registration, canvassing and phone banking.
3. Closer toward the primary or caucus in your state, we'll start organizing neighborhood teams so that we can get every single Bernie voter to the polls.

**[Yes! I want to attend an organizing event for Bernie.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2259/43f17890/5846caea/621c39b2/2194448071/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyMDkwMiJ9/ "http://map.berniesanders.com/#zipcode=20902&distance=50&daterange=this-week?utm_medium=email&utm_source=officialbernie2016&utm_campaign=events&utm_content=attend_an_event")**
**[Sorry, I can't make it, but I can chip in $3 to our campaign.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2259/43f17890/5846caea/621c39b3/2194448071/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/event-contribute?refcode=em150916-no-ev")**
Here are a few snippets reported from organizing events in the past week, to give you an idea of what other folks are doing and how excited everyone is:
> Colorado Springs, CO: _"We had a Bernie Birthday Bash in the outdoor patio area of a local cafe, and the weather was perfect! About half the people who came hadn't met before, but by the end of the night, we all felt like old friends. Having Bernie to organize around is turning out to be a great way to create community! It was intended as an informal event (complete with cake and singing "Happy Birthday" to Bernie -- which we videoed and posted on our Facebook page). But we did take about 45 minutes to give each person the chance to talk about why they support Bernie. I had tears in my eyes by the end of it because people had so much passion for his candidacy. We also registered everyone there who wasn't already registered to vote."_
> Titusville, FL: "_We held a Bernie Booth to get his name out during a city block party. 10 volunteers manned the booth while people ask us about his campaign. We signed up 15 more volunteers, passed out tons of flyers and gave out Bernie buttons and bumper stickers. To be honest, even in such a Republican strong city as ours, most people were excited to see us supporting him. Keep getting his policies out there on TV. People are starting to realize he is the best choice as president."_
> Las Vegas, NV: _"Flyering in English and in Spanish at El Super and La Bonita. People were very receptive. We found two excited volunteers. Passed out lots of flyers."_
**[Yes! I want to attend an organizing event for Bernie.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2259/43f17890/5846caea/621c39b2/2194448071/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyMDkwMiJ9/ "http://map.berniesanders.com/#zipcode=20902&distance=50&daterange=this-week?utm_medium=email&utm_source=officialbernie2016&utm_campaign=events&utm_content=attend_an_event")**
**[Sorry, I can't make it, but I can chip in $3 to our campaign.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2259/43f17890/5846caea/621c39b3/2194448071/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/event-contribute?refcode=em150916-no-ev")**
It's an honor working alongside you in this movement!
Claire Sandberg & Zack Exley
Bernie 2016

[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2259/43f17890/5846caea/621c39b0/2194448071/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=em150916events")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2259/43f17890/5846caea/621c39b1/2194448071/VEsP/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2259/43f17890/5846caea/621c39be/2194448071/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2259/43f17890/5846caea/621c39bf/2194448071/VEsHBA/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2259/43f17890/5846caea/621c39bc/2194448071/VEsHBw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Team Murphy
subject: So, that just happened
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Friends,

Did you check out the GOP presidential primary tonight? Because we did.

We had two takeaways from the ~~debacle~~ debate tonight: 1) Their agenda is downright frightening. And 2) **if Democrats don 't win back the Senate in 2016, some of that agenda could become reality.**

Our race in Florida could be the one that tips the balance of the Senate in our favor. We've never been more fired up to win this thing than we are right now.

[**Take action tonight. Let 's make sure we do our part to put the Senate back in Democratic hands by helping Patrick win. Make a contribution toward our FEC goal.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae209d/738133e4/3aeb92f6/7f8a4736/2221010761/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme150916?refcode=pme150916_c&recurring=true")

Thanks!

name: Rand Paul
subject: Your choice: Liberty or the status quo?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Fellow Conservative:

America can have another Clinton. We can have another Bush.

We can have any one of the other Big Government candidates that stood on the stage with me last night during the second Republican presidential debate.

Or Fellow Conservative, we can have a return to the U.S. Constitution and our precious Bill of Rights.

What's your choice?

**[Will you please stand with me during my campaign's Constitution Day Money Bomb with your most generous contribution of $20.16 or more IMMEDIATELY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30448272:s6p9BcmyN:m:1:879035888:965D10854846948F2A68F7172A710A25:r)**?

228 years ago today, our Founders handed down to us the document designed to restrain government and maximize individual liberty. The principles embedded in our U.S. Constitution have made our country the greatest and freest nation in human history.

But during last night's debate, my opponents virtually never even mentioned the U.S. Constitution.

When they did, they talked about how they'd get around it. Or they'd just ignore parts they don't like!

In fact, one of my opponents awkwardly skipped over the Fourth Amendment's guarantee of the right to privacy from government intrusion when he listed other liberties included in the Bill of Rights he'd protect!

Fellow Conservative, this is politics as usual. This is a political system that's been corrupted to its very core.

These are the symptoms of a nation on the brink of even more turmoil if patriots like you and me don't stand up and fight to save it.

I first ran for the U.S. Senate to take on this fight to restore our Constitution.

I'm running for President to finish it.

My plan to institute a 14.5% flat tax, and return $2 TRILLION to the American people, isn't just designed to get our economy moving and create jobs. It's designed to blow up our current tax code and force government to live within its means.

My plan to impose term limits in Washington, D.C. isn't just designed to change a few faces in Congress. It's designed to clean house of Big Government career politicians.

My plan to force Congress to read the bills they pass isn't just designed to force members of Congress to stop passing thousand-page bills at the last minute, it's designed to END lobbyists' grip on Washington, D.C.

If elected, I will fully REPEAL ObamaCare, end domestic government spying and finally audit and expose the damage the U.S. Federal Reserve has wreaked on our country.

Not one of my opponents can make any of these promises -- let alone point to a track record of delivering on the promises they make.

Name any policy and there's virtually no daylight between any of my opponents. Whether it's foreign policy, government spying or just Big Government in general, it's all just pandering, hot air and half-truths.

But Fellow Conservative, you do have a choice.

You can choose to return to the Constitutional principles that have made America great.

You can choose a candidate who can not only DEFEAT Hillary Clinton, but is committed to restoring the principles of liberty you and I hold so dear.

Today, during my Constitution Day Money Bomb, I'm asking you to make your voice heard.

Let the Washington Machine hear what you want.

If you're craving freedom like I am, **[please make your most generous contribution of $20.16 or more today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30448272:s6p9BcmyN:m:1:879035888:965D10854846948F2A68F7172A710A25:r)**. Your support will make all the difference.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30448273:s6p9BcmyN:m:1:879035888:965D10854846948F2A68F7172A710A25:r)

In Liberty,

body:
[](www.JohnKasich.com)
**_" Kasich smartly plays the adult among squabbling candidates" _**_\- Larry Sabato

_
_"**Score one point for Kasich. The tenor of this debate that Jake is creating is not what people want. "** -Ari Fleischer_
_
_
**_" But Kasich did exactly what he had to do: He came off as a strong, capable alternative for party loyalists considering a change of direction"_**_\- Matt Bai (Yahoo News)_

Peter, in last night's CNN debate, Gov. John Kasich showed America that he is ready to lead and has the experience to build consensus and tackle our most difficult challenges.

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30448522:W1DttcmN8:m:1:958431888:7423DEB02186A2522B8F159292E17341:r)
[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30448523:W1DttcmN8:m:1:958431888:7423DEB02186A2522B8F159292E17341:r)
**
Here's how you can help Gov. Kasich today:**

**1.** Please take a moment to [read this Yahoo News story about Gov. Kasich's debate performance](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30448524:W1DttcmN8:m:1:958431888:7423DEB02186A2522B8F159292E17341:r) and share it on social media.

**2.** [Chip in $25, $50 or more right now to help us get this message out and grow our support!](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30448525:W1DttcmN8:m:1:958431888:7423DEB02186A2522B8F159292E17341:r)

**3.** [Watch this clip from the debate](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30448522:W1DttcmN8:m:1:958431888:7423DEB02186A2522B8F159292E17341:r) and share it on Facebook!

Thank you for your help!

**John Weaver**
Chief Strategist[

name: randhpaulmd@gmail.com
subject: Make government smaller -- not BIGGER!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative:

If you want a politician to maintain the Washington Machine's failed status-quo you can have a Bush, a Clinton or any one of the Big Government politicians on stage with me.

But if you want to upend business as usual, we must have a change.

I'm running to abolish the IRS, impose term limits for career politicians and force Congress to read the bills they ram into law.

And I need your help to spread this message to as many voters as possible in the key early states.

**[My campaign and the grassroots have launched a Constitution Day Money Bomb, and I hope I can count on you to chip in $20.16 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30457878:sTXPl3mN7:m:1:879035888:E3074D7C6A4CECFD9F93A176F6CE7995:r)**.

Fellow Conservative, I ran for office because I was fed up with the politics as usual that was rigged for the well connected.

The bailouts, the failed stimulus package and ObamaCare were all payoffs to the Washington Machine cronies that plunged our nation deeper into debt and eroded our freedoms.

And the politicians in both parties would pay lip service to the Constitution, while scheming behind closed doors to undermine our values.

So I ran for office even when the big shots in my own party lined up behind their handpicked candidate.

I defeated the establishment because I had the support of patriots like you.

And since day one in office I have fought to defend the Bill of Rights.

You see, America is exceptional because 228 years ago today our founders delivered a revolutionary document that restrained government.

The framers meant every word that prioritized the liberty of Americans above the power of government.

And while there has been a constant struggle between those who would expand the powers of the federal government and those who defend liberty, I have been proud to always stand for the Bill of Rights.

Not when it was convenient.

Not some of the time.

Or even most of the time.

But all of the time.

And that is the choice our party faces in this election.

Will we compromise our defense of the Constitution? Or will we nominate a candidate who champions our values.

If you watched last night's debate you know there will always be a Bush or a Clinton for the Big Government crowd to try and foist on the electorate.

But I'm not running for the approval of the lobbyists and the insiders who make their living gaming the system.

I'm in this race to:

>> Drive a stake through the heart of the IRS and pass the largest tax cut in American history.

>> Audit the Federal Reserve and end the cycle of print-borrow-and-spend which has devalued our dollar and careened our nation into $19 trillion in debt.

>> Repeal ObamaCare 100%.

So I don't believe the contrast in this primary could be any clearer.

And with Hillary Clinton's campaign bogged down with scandal, our party has an opportunity to elect a candidate who champions our values.

**[That's why I hope I can count on you to chip in a contribution of $20.16 to the Constitution Day Money Bomb and help my campaign get this message in front of as many voters as possible](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30457878:sTXPl3mN7:m:1:879035888:E3074D7C6A4CECFD9F93A176F6CE7995:r)**.

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: I had to stop watching the Republican debate
body:
#
[**Make a $3 contribution to our campaign if you 're ready for a political revolution that creates a country in which children aren't living in poverty, kids can go to college, and seniors have health care.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2246/43f17890/58a4e908/621c249e/162553294/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gop_debate?refcode=em150917full")
Brothers and Sisters -
Last night, it took nearly two hours for the Republican debate to even briefly touch on an important issue: raising the minimum wage in this country from $7.25 an hour. The American people overwhelmingly want to raise the minimum wage, but not a single candidate embraced the idea with the same enthusiasm.
The truth is, once again, if you are one of the wealthiest people in this country, you had eleven candidates on the stage talking about your needs for almost three and a half hours. The rich are getting richer and everyone else is getting poorer, yet for what seemed like an eternity, all they could talk about was not letting women control their own bodies and defunding Planned Parenthood. If you are a veteran or military family member, there was a lot of talk about more money for war and confrontation, but no conversation about how the cost of war continues long after the last service member has returned home from overseas.
I think that's one of the reasons our campaign is doing so well. We are willing to talk about the issues that matter in the lives of all Americans, and not just a handful of special interests and wealthy campaign contributors.
And all throughout last night's debate, I kept thinking about some of the people I've met and stories I've received since our campaign began. Like the young mother from California who wrote me a few weeks ago saying:
> _"I'm 25 years old and about to have my first daughter. I want her to be able to go to college without going into insane amounts of debt. I want her to be able to get the healthcare she needs to stay happy and healthy."_
Or the printing company worker in upstate New York who wrote to me saying:
> _"I am paid $10.00 an hour for the past 2 years in a customer service role. I have 2 sons and cannot afford the daycare bill for them by myself. I've been forced to move home with my parents as my $650 paychecks after tax are not enough to live on with paying $500 for daycare just to go to work."_
Today, we live in the richest country in the history of the world, but that reality means little when people who work 40 hours a week are living in poverty, and hundreds of thousands of young people are forced to give up their dream of going to college because it is too expensive.
**The good news is, this is a nation we can rebuild together. And I am asking you to join me in this campaign to build a future for all of us, and not just a few on the top.**
[**Make a $3 contribution to our campaign if you 're ready for a political revolution that creates a country in which children aren't living in poverty, kids can go to college, and seniors have health care.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2246/43f17890/58a4e908/621c249e/162553294/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gop_debate?refcode=em150917full")
The truth is, I had to give up on the debate after two and a half hours. This country and our planet face enormous problems, and the Republican candidates on that stage last night barely touched upon them.
There was no discussion about racial justice, income inequality, or making college more affordable. Nothing about child poverty, parental leave, or ensuring that every American can retire with dignity. And with virtually every campaign backed by an enormous Super PAC (except Trump who is his own Super PAC), you can be sure there was no discussion of the grotesque amount of spending corrupting our political process.
And when the candidates did touch on actual issues, they were dead wrong on virtually every position they took.
In less than a month, we'll have our chance at the first Democratic presidential debate. But I'll need your support to keep growing our political revolution between now and then.
That's why your contribution is so important.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders

[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2246/43f17890/58a4e908/621c249e/162553294/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gop_debate?refcode=em150917full")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2246/43f17890/58a4e908/621c249f/162553294/VEsC/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2246/43f17890/58a4e908/621c249c/162553294/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2246/43f17890/58a4e908/621c249d/162553294/VEsA/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2246/43f17890/58a4e908/621c249a/162553294/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

**From** : Rand Paul [rand.paul@randpaul2016.com]
**To** : Fellow Conservative
**Subject** : Your choice: Liberty or the status quo?

Dear Fellow Conservative:

America can have another Clinton. We can have another Bush.

We can have any one of the other Big Government candidates that stood on the stage with me last night during the second Republican presidential debate.

Or Fellow Conservative, we can have a return to the U.S. Constitution and our precious Bill of Rights.

What's your choice?

**[Will you please stand with me during my campaign's Constitution Day Money Bomb with your most generous contribution of $20.16 or more IMMEDIATELY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30459518:WpewI3mNN:m:1:879035888:7AD8F8CAFA929B05E58C7548CF401B39:r)**?

228 years ago today, our Founders handed down to us the document designed to restrain government and maximize individual liberty. The principles embedded in our U.S. Constitution have made our country the greatest and freest nation in human history.

But during last night's debate, my opponents virtually never even mentioned the U.S. Constitution.

When they did, they talked about how they'd get around it. Or they'd just ignore parts they don't like!

In fact, one of my opponents awkwardly skipped over the Fourth Amendment's guarantee of the right to privacy from government intrusion when he listed other liberties included in the Bill of Rights he'd protect!

Fellow Conservative, this is politics as usual. This is a political system that's been corrupted to its very core.

These are the symptoms of a nation on the brink of even more turmoil if patriots like you and me don't stand up and fight to save it.

I first ran for the U.S. Senate to take on this fight to restore our Constitution.

I'm running for President to finish it.

My plan to institute a 14.5% flat tax, and return $2 TRILLION to the American people, isn't just designed to get our economy moving and create jobs. It's designed to blow up our current tax code and force government to live within its means.

My plan to impose term limits in Washington, D.C. isn't just designed to change a few faces in Congress. It's designed to clean house of Big Government career politicians.

My plan to force Congress to read the bills they pass isn't just designed to force members of Congress to stop passing thousand-page bills at the last minute, it's designed to END lobbyists' grip on Washington, D.C.

If elected, I will fully REPEAL ObamaCare, end domestic government spying and finally audit and expose the damage the U.S. Federal Reserve has wreaked on our country.

Not one of my opponents can make any of these promises -- let alone point to a track record of delivering on the promises they make.

Name any policy and there's virtually no daylight between any of my opponents. Whether it's foreign policy, government spying or just Big Government in general, it's all just pandering, hot air and half-truths.

But Fellow Conservative, you do have a choice.

You can choose to return to the Constitutional principles that have made America great.

You can choose a candidate who can not only DEFEAT Hillary Clinton, but is committed to restoring the principles of liberty you and I hold so dear.

Today, during my Constitution Day Money Bomb, I'm asking you to make your voice heard.

Let the Washington Machine hear what you want.

If you're craving freedom like I am, **[please make your most generous contribution of $20.16 or more today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30459518:WpewI3mNN:m:1:879035888:7AD8F8CAFA929B05E58C7548CF401B39:r)**. Your support will make all the difference.

They are sacrificing common sense at the altar of popular sentiment." The Governor continues, "Donald Trump might be ready for prime time, but he is not ready to govern." Governor Pataki is. - If you agree, please contribute $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or even $2,700 today. Thank you, Team Pataki - Paid for by Pataki for President, Inc. www.GeorgePataki.com - Click to view this email in a browser
